signals.headline: US and Iran Confirmed in Discussions for Second Round of Face-to-Face Talks Before Ceasefire Expires Next Week | YES | H
signals.raw:
US and Iran Confirmed in Discussions for Second Round of Face-to-Face Talks Before Ceasefire Expires Next Week | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3]

Sources report Washington and Tehran are arranging further negotiations on key issues like Iran's nuclear program and enriched uranium stocks, amid a fragile ceasefire following recent US naval blockade in the Strait of Hormuz and prior saber-rattling
matched_markets: US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2%, up from 2.0% in February but below 2.4% market forecasts.** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2]

This data, released April 2, 2026 by Statistics Korea, reflects fuel price caps offsetting oil surges from the Iran conflict, with core inflation easing to 2.2% and monthly CPI at 0.3%.[1][2] No newer announcements (post-April 2) on April 18 co
